name: Vegetable Rice Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Whole wheat flour or all-purpose flour
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cooked brown rice, grated carrots, finely chopped onions, snipped fresh parsley, minced garlic, salt, and ground black pepper.
2. Add the beaten eggs and mix well to incorporate.
3. Gradually add the whole wheat flour or all-purpose flour until the mixture is well combined.
4. Form the mixture into 12 thin patties by hand, pressing firmly.
5. Heat a large skillet with vegetable oil over medium heat.
6. Cook the patties in the heated oil, turning once, until brown and crispy on both sides. This should take about 3-4 minutes per side.
7. Serve hot with dairy sour cream or yogurt if desired.
Each serving provides:
243 calories
5.7 g protein
11.6 g fat
29.6 g carbohydrate
390 mg sodium
91 mg cholesterol
Note: Optional ingredients are omitted from the nutritional calculations. When ingredient options appear in a recipe, the first ingredient choice is used for calculation.
